title: OSINT Evidence Metadata
description: Standardised metadata recorded for every piece of evidence so that records remain consistent across investigators.

case_id.description: Identifier of the case/operation this evidence belongs to.

operation_id.description: Optional grouping id; evidence sharing an operation_id can be committed under one Merkle root.

title.description: Short human-readable description of the evidence.

source_url.description: Originating URL or location of the artifact (if applicable).

platform.description: Platform name, e.g. twitter/x, telegram, facebook, reddit.

author_handle.description: Account/handle that authored the original content.

captured_at.description: When the artifact was originally captured/collected (ISO-8601).

language.description: ISO language code of the content, if known.

chain_of_custody_note.description: Free-text note about how the evidence was obtained/handled.
